016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
026
027/**
028 * Metadata on bean properties specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the {@link Rdf @Rdf} annotation
029 * on the bean property.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
033
034 * </ul>
035 */
036public class RdfBeanPropertyMeta extends ExtendedBeanPropertyMeta {
037
038   /**
039    * Default instance.
040    */
041   public static final RdfBeanPropertyMeta DEFAULT = new RdfBeanPropertyMeta();
042
043   private RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat = RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT;
044   private Namespace namespace;
045   private boolean isBeanUri;
046
047   /**
048    * Constructor.
049    *
050    * @param bpm The metadata of the bean property of this additional metadata.
051    * @param mp RDF metadata provider (for finding information about other artifacts).
052    */
053   public RdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm, RdfMetaProvider mp) {
054      super(bpm);
055
056      var bpmcm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
057      var bmcm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanMeta().getBeanInfo();
058      var ap = bpmcm.getMarshallingContext().getAnnotationProvider();
059      var rdfs = new MultiList<>(
060         rstream(ap.find(Rdf.class, bmcm)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList(),
061         reverse(bpm.getAnnotations(Rdf.class).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList())
062      );
063      var schemas = new MultiList<>(
064         rstream(ap.find(RdfSchema.class, bmcm)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList(),
065         reverse(bpm.getAnnotations(RdfSchema.class).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList())
066      );
067
068      rdfs.forEach(x -> {
069         if (x.collectionFormat() != RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT)
070            collectionFormat = x.collectionFormat();
071         if (x.beanUri())
072            isBeanUri = true;
073      });
074
075      namespace = RdfUtils.findNamespace(rdfs, schemas);
076   }
077
078   private RdfBeanPropertyMeta() {
079      super(null);
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Returns the RDF namespace associated with this bean property.
084    *
085    * <p>
086    * Namespace is determined in the following order of {@link Rdf#prefix() @Rdf(prefix)} annotations:
087    * <ol>
088    *    <li>Bean property field.
089    *    <li>Bean getter.
090    *    <li>Bean setter.
091    *    <li>Bean class.
092    *    <li>Bean package.
093    *    <li>Bean superclasses.
094    *    <li>Bean superclass packages.
095    *    <li>Bean interfaces.
096    *    <li>Bean interface packages.
097    * </ol>
098    *
099    * @return The namespace associated with this bean property, or <jk>null</jk> if no namespace is associated with it.
100    */
101   public Namespace getNamespace() { return namespace; }
102
103   /**
104    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this bean property is marked with {@link Rdf#beanUri() @Rdf(beanUri)} as <jk>true</jk>.
105    *
106    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this bean property annotation is <jk>true</jk>.
107    */
108   public boolean isBeanUri() { return isBeanUri; }
109
110   /**
111    * Returns the RDF collection format of this property from the {@link Rdf#collectionFormat} annotation on this bean
112    * property.
113    *
114    * @return The RDF collection format, or {@link RdfCollectionFormat#DEFAULT} if annotation not specified.
115    */
116   protected RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() { return collectionFormat; }
117}
